description_long: This is a compact, rectangular backpack with a structured form, primarily colored in warm brown and orange tones with light beige trim outlining the edges. The front features a flap secured by a prominent brown strap and a metallic buckle, giving it a classic, utilitarian look. The sides and back are reinforced with darker brown panels, and the back is equipped with two long, adjustable shoulder straps, each fastened with metal hardware. The top and sides are smooth, with no visible external pockets or mesh compartments. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on durability and ease of access. The backpack appears suitable for everyday urban use, such as commuting or casual outings.
description: A structured, brown and orange backpack with a front flap, buckle closure, and two adjustable shoulder straps. The design is simple, functional, and urban-oriented.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main flap with a buckle strap, beige trim, and one side panel.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the front flap, buckle, and the opposite side panel.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the two long shoulder straps and the back panel.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the full length of the shoulder straps and the back structure.
attribute_strap_design: Two long, adjustable shoulder straps made of brown material with metal hardware; no visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed via the front flap; no visible external or side pockets.
